title: 1.1: Tests that config.LoadConfig returns nil (no error) when loading configuration from a directory containing a valid JSON config file
1.2: Tests that config.LoadConfig returns an error when the specified configuration file does not exist
1.3: Tests that config.LoadConfig returns an error when the configuration file contains invalid JSON syntax
1.4: Tests that config.LoadConfig returns an error when bind_port contains a non-numeric or invalid value
1.5: Tests that SFTPD banner is non-empty after loading a configuration where banner was set to empty or whitespace-only value
1.6: Tests that config.LoadConfig returns an error when SFTPD upload_mode is set to an invalid value
1.7: Tests that config.LoadConfig returns an error when data provider external_auth_scope is set to an invalid value
2.1: Places the test for loading valid and invalid configuration files in config/config_test.go
2.2: Places the test for empty/whitespace banner replacement in config/config_test.go
2.3: Places the test for invalid upload_mode handling in config/config_test.go
2.4: Places the test for invalid external_auth_scope handling in config/config_test.go
3.1: All tests use Go testing framework with *testing.T parameter in function signature
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern Test<BehaviorOrFunctionName> with uppercase Test prefix
3.3: All tests use t.Errorf or t.Error for reporting test assertion failures
4.1: Follows temporary file cleanup pattern for test cases that create temporary config files
4.2: Follows file writing pattern for test cases that write temporary JSON config files
